Bash(for file in /home/ubuntu/code_realmeet/app/edit-profile.tsx /home/ubuntu/code_realmeet/app/invite/[token].tsx /home/ubuntu/code_realmeet/app/auth/signup-individual.tsx /home/ubuntu/code_realmeet/app/group-info.tsx /home/ubuntu/code_realmeet/app/\\\(tabs\\\)/browse.tsx /home/ubuntu/code_realmeet/components/ActivityCard.tsx; do
  if grep -q "import.*Image.*from.*['\\"]react-native" "$file" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "$file"
  fi
done)

Bash(python3 -c "
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
img = Image.new\('RGB', \(400, 300\), '#F2F2F7'\)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(img\)
# Draw a simple camera icon placeholder
draw.rounded_rectangle\([160, 110, 240, 190], radius=10, fill='#AEAEB2'\)
draw.polygon\([\(185, 140\), \(185, 160\), \(215, 150\)], fill='#F2F2F7'\)
draw.ellipse\([190, 130, 210, 150], fill='#F2F2F7'\)
img.save\('assets/images/placeholder-activity.png'\)
print\('Created placeholder'\)
" 2>&1)
